name: East Side Gallery and Kreuzberg Walk
description: A low-cost route through murals, river paths, and food stops. Works well with a dog outside.

name: Museum Island Slot
description: Choose one museum instead of trying to do all five. Book a timed ticket when possible.

name: Delsjon Lake Hike
description: Forest and lake trails reachable by local transit, strong choice for a dog-friendly half day.

name: Southern Archipelago Ferry Hop
description: Use public transport ferries for islands, sea air, and picnic stops.

name: Castle District Early Walk
description: Go early for quiet lanes, castle views, and a slower romantic route before crowds.

name: Traditional Beer Hall Dinner
description: Classic Czech food and beer. Confirm dog access if you are travelling with the small dog.

name: Kazimierz Food and History Walk
description: Low-cost neighborhood route through cafes, street food, courtyards, and Jewish heritage sites.

name: Planty Park and Wawel Loop
description: A free loop around the old town edge and castle hill for a relaxed first day.

name: Sandskogen Forest and Beach Loop
description: Forest paths, beach air, and easy picnic stops close to town.

name: Ystad Timbered Streets Walk
description: A slow walk through colorful old streets, cafes, and small-town corners.

name: Falsterbo Beach and Bath Huts
description: A quiet coastal walk with beach scenery and village stops.

name: Bird Station and Lighthouse Area
description: A slower nature stop for birdlife, coastal views, and less obvious Skane character.

name: Canal Belt and Jordaan Walk
description: Self-guided canal loop, small shops, cafes, and quieter bridges away from the busiest museum area.

name: Rijksmuseum Timed Visit
description: Pick one major museum and book a timed slot instead of overloading the day.

name: Thermal Bath Session
description: A classic Budapest anchor activity; choose one bath and build the day around it.

name: Danube and Castle Hill Walk
description: Free route with river views, bridges, and castle hill viewpoints.

name: MuseumsQuartier and Coffeehouse Loop
description: Combine one exhibition with a classic coffeehouse stop and Neubau wandering.

name: Prater and Danube Canal Walk
description: Good low-cost outdoor route with parks, canal paths, and transit access.

name: Alfama Viewpoint Walk
description: Tiles, steep lanes, viewpoints, and slow cafe stops in the old city.

name: Belem Monuments and Pastry Stop
description: Riverfront monuments, gardens, and the famous pastry stop; book paid interiors selectively.

name: Ribeira and Gaia River Walk
description: Bridge views, riverfront wandering, and Gaia viewpoints without needing a tour.

name: Port Cellar Tasting
description: Book one cellar tasting rather than several; confirm dog rules if travelling with dog.

name: Gaudi Architecture Morning
description: Choose one paid Gaudi site and combine with free exterior architecture walks.

name: Gracia Food and Plaza Walk
description: Slow neighborhood route with plazas, bakeries, and local streets.

name: Ancient Rome Exterior Loop
description: Colosseum exterior, forums viewpoints, piazzas, and free historic atmosphere.

name: Vatican or Borghese Timed Slot
description: Pick one big paid site and reserve ahead; do not stack multiple major museums in one day.

name: Promenade and Castle Hill Walk
description: Sea walk, old town lanes, and viewpoint without major cost.

name: Riviera Local Train Day
description: Use local rail for Monaco, Menton, or Antibes depending on weather and energy.

name: Canal Saint-Martin to Montmartre Walk
description: Lower-cost Paris day with neighborhoods, bakeries, parks, and viewpoints.

name: One Major Museum Slot
description: Pick Louvre, Orsay, or Pompidou; booking one slot keeps the day sane.

name: POLIN and Old Town Route
description: Strong culture day combining one museum with the rebuilt old town.

name: Lazienki Park Walk
description: Large park route that works well as a low-cost afternoon.

name: Motlawa Waterfront and Old Town
description: Colorful streets, harbor views, amber shops, and easy food stops.

name: Sopot Beach Add-on
description: Local rail to Sopot for beach, pier area, and seaside walking.

name: Central Market and Old Riga
description: Market halls, old town lanes, and river edge for a low-cost first day.

name: Art Nouveau District Walk
description: Self-guided architecture loop through one of Riga's strongest neighborhoods.

name: Tallinn Old Town Viewpoints
description: Medieval lanes, viewpoints, city walls, and cozy cafes.

name: Telliskivi Creative City
description: Design shops, casual food, street art, and relaxed evening option.

name: Speicherstadt and Harbor Walk
description: Brick warehouses, harbor views, canals, and good photo stops.

name: Miniatur Wunderland Timed Visit
description: Book ahead if you want the classic Hamburg indoor highlight.
